name: Corn-on-The-Cob in a Spicy Gravy (Masala Makai)
recipeIngredient: 425 grams can of tomatoes, juice only
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the corn kernels from the cobs.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add onions and garlic, sauté until golden brown.
4. Pour in the tomato juice, stir gently.
5. Season with salt, pepper, and chili powder to taste.
6. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Place corn kernels in the gravy, cook until heated through.
8. Turn off the heat and serve hot over rice or bread.
